completed_milestone_groups.theme: Architecture review, PRD consistency, parser direction, and baseline architecture verification
completed_milestone_groups.boundary: Establishes architecture and parser proof foundations, not production legal-answering readiness.

completed_milestone_groups.theme: GraphRAG, FalkorDB, retrieval, ontology, evidence, and semantic scoring proof cycles
completed_milestone_groups.boundary: Provides bounded proof cycles and diagnostics, not final product retrieval quality or ontology/product readiness.

completed_milestone_groups.theme: Consultant XML source structuring, MiniMax-assisted discovery, graph context staging, and workline recovery
completed_milestone_groups.boundary: Establishes bounded Consultant XML/source workflow evidence, not parser completeness for all legal sources.

completed_milestone_groups.theme: Reusable Architecture Control Plane construction, default registry integration, RDF projection proof, and projection hardening
completed_milestone_groups.boundary: Establishes ACP governance/projection mechanics, not full decision lifecycle governance or RDF/SHACL/SPARQL engine proof.

current_milestone.title: law-nexus Project State Documentation Pack
current_milestone.goal: Create a cold-reader documentation package with Markdown docs, parseable JSON summaries, and Mermaid diagrams while preserving source/projection and proof boundaries.

recommended_next.title: ACP Decision Lifecycle Workflow
recommended_next.why: ACP has prompt/proposal/candidate/gate/finding records and hardened projection diagnostics; the next control-plane gap is safe decision promotion governance.

alternatives.title: RDF engine spike
alternatives.why: Only if engine-executed RDF/SPARQL proof becomes valuable.

alternatives.title: SHACL engine spike
alternatives.why: Only if pySHACL-style validation becomes valuable.

alternatives.title: Isolated git-lex alignment spike
alternatives.why: Only if identity/provenance compatibility becomes priority; do not run git-lex initialization in the main repository.

alternatives.title: ACP recovery/dashboard views
alternatives.why: Only if operator navigation becomes a higher priority than lifecycle governance.
